page_subheadline: Whether you need a soft landing or a full relocation plan, there is a way to work together that fits where you are right now.
free_community_description: Join the Burnout to Bliss Abroad Skool community and get access to free resources, real conversations, and a community of nurses and healthcare workers who get it.
courses_description: Practical, no-fluff guides that walk you through exactly what you need to know about living in the Dominican Republic. Visas, cost of living, neighborhoods, banking, healthcare, and more.
dfy_description: This is for the person who is done researching and ready to move. Ricardo and I work with you directly — from your first strategy session to your first week on the ground in the DR.
dfy_feature_1: Two 60-minute strategy sessions with Coleen and Ricardo
dfy_feature_2: Personalized relocation timeline and action plan
dfy_feature_3: Neighborhood recommendations based on your lifestyle and budget
dfy_feature_4: Ricardo's on-the-ground guidance on visa, residency, and navigating DR systems
dfy_feature_5: Trusted referrals for housing, attorneys, and local services
dfy_feature_6: 30 days of email support after your arrival
clarity_call_description: Book a free 30-minute clarity call with me. No pitch, no pressure — just an honest conversation about where you are and what your options are.
